title: Temporal variation in plant-pollinator interactions, RMBL, 2013-2015

title: Habitat loss increases seasonal interaction rewiring in plant-pollinator networks

title: Plant-pollinator interactions over 120 years

title: EcoMon Northeast U.S. Continental Shelf plankton dataset
audit_notes: NCEI describes plankton abundance, distribution, temperature, and salinity, not observed pairwise trophic edges.
